name: Server Status
desc: Responds to C00PacketServerQuery with the server's status as a JSON string (MOTD, players, version, favicon, mod info).

fields.name: jsonResponse
fields.desc: JSON-encoded ServerStatusResponse with version, players, description, favicon

notes: The JSON response includes: version (name + protocol number), players (max + online + optional sample list), description (MOTD ChatComponent), and optionally favicon (base64-encoded PNG with 'data:image/png;base64,' prefix). For modded servers, may include Forge mod info.

modules.name: ServerInfo
modules.purpose: Read server info JSON (MOTD, players, version) for server detection.

modules.name: BrandDetector
modules.purpose: Read server info JSON (MOTD, players, version) for server detection.
